summary: Verified 3 targeted fixes: (1) new root-level /health endpoint for Kubernetes liveness probe, (2) /api/contact & /api/volunteer regression, (3) removal of privacy-sensitive /images/15.jpeg from Gallery. Backend pytest 12/12 pass (Iter1's 3 _id-vs-id failures are now resolved — main agent added response_model_by_alias=False). Frontend Gallery correctly renders 43 unique images (1-14, 16-44) with no reference to image 15, category filter still works ('Showing 43 of 43 photographs' text present), and Contact form submits end-to-end (Message sent! confirmation shown, record persisted in Mongo with proper 'id' field). Home page loads cleanly. One minor content issue found: hardcoded '44 photographs' copy still appears on Gallery hero (Gallery.jsx L19) and Home CTA (Home.jsx L180) — should read 43 or use GALLERY.length dynamically.

issues: Hardcoded copy '44 photographs. One story of change.' in /app/frontend/src/pages/Gallery.jsx line 19 is now stale — actual gallery has 43 items after image 15 removal.

Hardcoded copy 'Explore the full gallery — 44 photographs' in /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx line 180 is also stale. Best fix: render {GALLERY.length} instead of a hardcoded number so future edits don't drift again.

action_items: Update Gallery.jsx hero title and Home.jsx gallery CTA to say '43 photographs' or bind to GALLERY.length dynamically.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L111 /health endpoint: correctly registered on the FastAPI app (not the /api router), so Kubernetes liveness probe on port 8001 gets a 200 JSON. Externally /health is routed to the frontend (only /api goes to backend via ingress), which is expected — the probe is pod-internal.
server.py: response_model_by_alias=False is now set on all four contact/volunteer routes, correctly resolving the Iter1 _id vs id serialization bug. Nice fix.

Consider deleting the actual /images/15.jpeg file from the frontend public folder if privacy-sensitive; currently only the reference in GALLERY array was removed but the file may still be reachable at the direct URL /images/15.jpeg. Suggest confirming with the requester whether the physical asset should also be deleted from /app/frontend/public/images/.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_aasw_api.py (added TestHealth.test_root_health_liveness against http://localhost:8001/health and a permissive test_image_15_still_served_at_asset_level)
test_credentials: N/A - no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: 1 contact record created via UI: name 'TEST UI Contact Iter2', email test_ui_iter2@example.com. 1 additional contact + 1 volunteer via pytest (TEST_ prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 12/12 pytest green. Health probe fix verified. Gallery renders 43 unique images with no img15 reference. Only lingering minor is stale '44 photographs' copy in Gallery.jsx L19 and Home.jsx L180. Physical file /images/15.jpeg may still exist on disk — confirm with main agent whether to delete asset file too.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration was a targeted regression + fix verification pass, all target fixes confirmed working. The only remaining item is a stale numeric literal in two frontend files caused by not binding the copy to GALLERY.length when the image was removed from the data array.
